title: Lybrate is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lybrate is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
